name: IBOBS Claims Knowledge Cache Filesystem Pressure
programText:
A = data('{{cache_utilization_metric}}', filter=filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}') and filter('service.name', 'claims-knowledge') and filter('service.instance.id', '{{instance}}') and filter('mountpoint', '{{cache_mountpoint}}') and filter('demo.metric_source', '{{evidence_metric_source}}')).max(by=['service.name', 'service.instance.id', 'mountpoint']).publish(label='Claims Knowledge Cache Utilization')
detect(when(A > {{filesystem_utilization_threshold}}, lasting='2m')).publish('Claims Knowledge Cache Filesystem Pressure')

rule.description: Claims knowledge cache utilization is above the lab threshold for the synthetic cache volume.

name: IBOBS Claims Knowledge APM Latency
programText:
A = data('{{claim_status_latency_metric}}', filter=filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}') and filter('service.name', 'claims-knowledge') and filter('service.instance.id', '{{instance}}') and filter('app.business_transaction', 'claim_status_response') and filter('demo.metric_source', '{{evidence_metric_source}}')).max(by=['service.name', 'service.instance.id', 'app.business_transaction']).publish(label='AI Claim Status Latency')
detect(when(A > {{apm_latency_threshold_ms}}, lasting='2m')).publish('Claims Knowledge APM Latency')

rule.description: AI Claim Status latency is elevated for the claims-knowledge service.

name: IBOBS Claims Knowledge APM Error Rate
programText:
A = data('service.request', filter=filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}') and filter('service.instance.id', '{{instance}}') and filter('sf_service', 'claims-knowledge') and filter('sf_error', 'true')).count()
B = data('service.request', filter=filter('deployment.environment', '{{deployment_environment}}') and filter('service.instance.id', '{{instance}}') and filter('sf_service', 'claims-knowledge')).count()
C = (A / B).publish(label='Error Rate')
detect(when(C > {{apm_error_threshold}}, lasting='2m')).publish('Claims Knowledge APM Error Rate')

rule.description: Splunk APM service request error rate is elevated for the claims-knowledge service.
